headline: How Assurant’s AI-Focused Connected Living Push At Assurant (AIZ) Has Changed Its Investment Story
summary: In late June 2026, Assurant emphasized growth in its fee-based, capital-light businesses such as Connected Living and Global Housing, alongside a strong earnings track record and ongoing capital deployment across investments, M&A, and share repurchases. The company also released Canada-specific insights from its 2026 Global Connected Consumer Trends Report, highlighting rising demand for AI-enabled protection plans and customized coverage that supports more flexible, transparent digital...
